segments.text: On the first day of the seventh month, you are to hold a sacred assembly, and you must not do any regular work. This will be a day for you to sound the trumpets.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: As a pleasing aroma to the LORD, you are to present a burnt offering of one young bull, one ram, and seven male lambs a year old, all unblemished,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: together with their grain offerings of fine flour mixed with oil—three-tenths of an ephah with the bull, two-tenths of an ephah with the ram,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: and a tenth of an ephah with each of the seven male lambs.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Include one male goat as a sin offering to make atonement for you.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: These are in addition to the monthly and daily burnt offerings with their prescribed grain offerings and drink offerings. They are a pleasing aroma, an offering made by fire to the LORD.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: On the tenth day of this seventh month, you are to hold a sacred assembly, and you shall humble yourselves;  you must not do any work.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Present as a pleasing aroma to the LORD a burnt offering of one young bull, one ram, and seven male lambs a year old, all unblemished,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: together with their grain offerings of fine flour mixed with oil—three-tenths of an ephah with the bull, two-tenths of an ephah with the ram,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: and a tenth of an ephah with each of the seven lambs.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Include one male goat for a sin offering, in addition to the sin offering of atonement and the regular burnt offering with its grain offering and drink offerings.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: On the fifteenth day of the seventh month, you are to hold a sacred assembly; you must not do any regular work, and you shall observe a feast to the LORD for seven days.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: As a pleasing aroma to the LORD, you are to present an offering made by fire, a burnt offering of thirteen young bulls, two rams, and fourteen male lambs a year old, all unblemished,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: along with the grain offering of three-tenths of an ephah of fine flour mixed with oil with each of the thirteen bulls, two-tenths of an ephah with each of the two rams,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: and a tenth of an ephah with each of the fourteen lambs.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Include one male goat as a sin offering, in addition to the regular burnt offering with its grain offering and drink offering.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: On the second day you are to present twelve young bulls, two rams, and fourteen male lambs a year old, all unblemished,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: along with the grain and drink offerings for the bulls, rams, and lambs, according to the number prescribed.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Include one male goat as a sin offering, in addition to the regular burnt offering with its grain offering and drink offering.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: On the third day you are to present eleven bulls, two rams, and fourteen male lambs a year old, all unblemished,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: along with the grain and drink offerings for the bulls, rams, and lambs, according to the number prescribed.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Include one male goat as a sin offering, in addition to the regular burnt offering with its grain offering and drink offering.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: On the fourth day you are to present ten bulls, two rams, and fourteen male lambs a year old, all unblemished,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: along with the grain and drink offerings for the bulls, rams, and lambs, according to the number prescribed.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Include one male goat as a sin offering, in addition to the regular burnt offering with its grain offering and drink offering.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: On the fifth day you are to present nine bulls, two rams, and fourteen male lambs a year old, all unblemished,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: along with the grain and drink offerings for the bulls, rams, and lambs, according to the number prescribed.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Include one male goat as a sin offering, in addition to the regular burnt offering with its grain offering and drink offering.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: On the sixth day you are to present eight bulls, two rams, and fourteen male lambs a year old, all unblemished,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: along with the grain and drink offerings for the bulls, rams, and lambs, according to the number prescribed.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Include one male goat as a sin offering, in addition to the regular burnt offering with its grain offering and drink offering.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: On the seventh day you are to present seven bulls, two rams, and fourteen male lambs a year old, all unblemished,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: along with the grain and drink offerings for the bulls, rams, and lambs, according to the number prescribed.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Include one male goat as a sin offering, in addition to the regular burnt offering with its grain offering and drink offering.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: On the eighth day you are to hold a solemn assembly; you must not do any regular work.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: As a pleasing aroma to the LORD, you are to present an offering made by fire, a burnt offering of one bull, one ram, and seven male lambs a year old, all unblemished,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: along with the grain and drink offerings for the bulls, rams, and lambs, according to the number prescribed.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Include one male goat as a sin offering, in addition to the regular burnt offering with its grain offering and drink offering.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: You are to present these offerings to the LORD at your appointed times, in addition to your vow and freewill offerings, whether burnt offerings, grain offerings, drink offerings, or peace offerings.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: So Moses spoke all this to the Israelites just as the LORD had commanded him.
